scope.domain: Isaac warehouse visual simulation plus deterministic 20 Hz differential-drive kinematics
scope.command_owner: warehouse_nav14 perception -> candidate BEV -> candidate acados NMPC
scope.global_reference: Phase 5-A USD Oracle A* path only
scope.oracle_role: independent swept-collision supervisor with allow-or-abort authority

dynamic_scenario.name: crossing_cart
dynamic_scenario.continuity: world-time trajectory; never regenerated relative to ego

checks: candidate solver status and finite bounded command
yaw-aware swept robot footprint against raw USD occupancy
yaw-aware swept robot footprint against the moving cart
supervisor.response: abort before applying the unsafe command; never replace it

latency_boundary.hard_gate: JPEG encode/decode + candidate inference + depth-lift + NMPC solve
latency_boundary.reported_not_gated: Isaac Replicator render wall time; offline simulation may run slower than real time
